examples.title: VNF Deployment Workflow
examples.description: Basic orchestration process for VNF deployment
examples.code:
PROCEDURE DeployVNF
  1. Validate service request
  2. Allocate NFVI resources
  3. Instantiate VNF image
  4. Configure network connections
  5. Monitor service health
examples.explanation: Simplified orchestration steps for deploying network functions
